nodes.content:
👋 Still thinking about Bohol?

No pressure! But wanted to share:

• Updated earning reports just in (still 395K+)
• New client from your city bought last week
• Only 2 units left (one might be claimed this week)

Anything still unclear? Happy to clarify.

💰 Quick reminder why this works:

Your money elsewhere:
★ Stocks: 8-12% per year (risky)
★ Bonds: 3-5% per year (boring)
★ Real estate back home: 3-5% (expensive)
★ Crypto: -50% to +500% (stressful)

🏝️ Panglao villa:
★ 20-25% guaranteed return (boring in the best way)
★ Monthly payments (not waiting for exit)
★ Tangible asset (not digital worry)
★ Appreciating property (bonus)

Ready to talk numbers?

📅 Let's find a time this week:

• 30-minute investment review call
• No obligation
• Answer all remaining questions
• See why 50+ investors already chose us

When's best for you?
- Today evening?
- Tomorrow morning?
- Wednesday?
- Thursday?

What's holding you back? (Real questions welcome):

• Still skeptical of returns?
• Worried about risks?
• Concerned about legality?
• Undecided between villas?
• Waiting on financing clarity?

Tell me. We'll address it directly.
